bird.name: 查島鸚鵡
bird.summary: 查岛鹦鹉（學名：Cyanoramphus forbesi，台湾作查坦島黃額鸚鵡），又名佛氏黃額長尾鸚鵡，是查塔姆群島內特有的一種稀有鸚鵡。 分佈及棲息地 查島鸚鵡棲息在查塔姆群島及匹特島的矮樹林。由於獵殺、家貓的入侵及失去棲息地，牠們的數量於1938年在芒格爾只餘下100隻。雖…

relations.subject: 查島鸚鵡
relations.evidence: This parakeet is one of New Zealand's rarest birds and is classified as Vulnerable on the IUCN Red List, as a result of a range of threats to the species survival, including habitat loss, predation, and hybridization
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 查島鸚鵡
relations.evidence: 3) |year=1985 |location=Cambridge, UK |pages=195–211 |chapter=Status, habits and conservation of Cyanoramphus parakeets in the New Zealand region}} These threats include deforestation and habitat destruction, the introduction of predators, and the fact that the entire population is confined to two small islands in the Chatham Islands group-Mangere and Little Mangere Islands, which are only 112ha and 16ha respectively.{{cite journal |last=Taylor |first=R
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
